# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ${{ runner.workspace }}/path/to/pip-packages
            config-files
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.job }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        env:
          NODE_VERSION: '12.x'
          PIP_VERSION: 'latest'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          npm install
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Build
        run: |
          # Add build commands

      - name: Save cache
        if: success()
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ${{ runner.workspace }}/path/to/pip-packages
            config-files
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ runner.job }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        env:
          NODE_VERSION: '12.x'
          PIP_VERSION: 'latest'
